    updateAccountStatus(int, String) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.Customer
    Dedicated method to update the account status of a customer, for the debt automation engine, given their ID.

    Updates the role of a user in the database.

    Adds or updates an IPOS stock item in the database.
